issues.description: Condition should be 'HasRestingDon' with count:1 (cost DON!! −1), but the passive ability 'If you have 6 or less DON!! cards on your field' is completely missing. This requires a separate passive effect with condition HasRestingDon count:6 (≤6 DON!!) that grants protection and +2000 power.

Action sequence is incomplete. The effect should: (1) look at top 5 cards, (2) add up to 1 to hand, (3) place rest at bottom in any order, (4) trash 1 from hand. Current DSL only has SearchDeck + TrashFromHand with no logic for viewing 5 cards, selecting 1, reordering the rest, or the conditional trash.

Missing passive effect for the static ability: 'If you have 6 or less DON!! cards on your field, this Character cannot be removed from the field by your opponent's effects and gains +2000 power.' This should be a separate effect with trigger 'Trigger' (or no trigger, permanent), condition HasRestingDon count:6, and actions: GiveKeyword (Protect/Unremovable) + PowerBoost +2000.
